name: HEMNES TV unit
description: HEMNES TV unit - white stain/light brown 58 1/4x18 1/2x22 1/2 ". Solid wood has a natural feel. Large drawers make it easy to keep your things organized. The top panel of the TV bench is intended for a TV with a maximum weight of 55 lbs. Coordinates with other furniture in the HEMNES series.
